tags.label: Framework not MECE
tags.description: Buckets overlap or key dimensions missing

tags.label: No framework used
tags.description: Jumped to conclusions without structuring approach

tags.label: Framework too narrow
tags.description: Framework covers only part of the problem space

tags.label: No prioritization in framework
tags.description: All buckets treated equally without ranking by importance

tags.label: Vague hypothesis
tags.description: Hypothesis stated without specificity or testability

tags.label: No hypothesis formed
tags.description: Candidate explores data without a stated hypothesis

tags.label: Hypothesis not data-driven
tags.description: Hypothesis not updated when data contradicts it

tags.label: Hypothesis abandoned under pressure
tags.description: Changed hypothesis without logical reason when challenged

tags.label: Arithmetic error
tags.description: Calculation mistake that affects the analysis

tags.label: Avoided quantification
tags.description: Made claims that should have been quantified but weren't

tags.label: Weak estimation
tags.description: Market sizing or estimation lacked reasonable anchors

tags.label: Slow with numbers
tags.description: Took excessive time on calculations; disrupted interview flow

tags.label: No sanity check on numbers
tags.description: Accepted implausible numerical results without checking

tags.label: Surface-level business insight
tags.description: Recommendations are generic and lack commercial depth

tags.label: Wrong prioritization
tags.description: Focused on low-impact areas over high-impact drivers

tags.label: Ignored implementation constraints
tags.description: Recommendations are impractical given business realities

tags.label: Missed second-order effects
tags.description: Did not consider competitive response, risk, or downstream impact

tags.label: No clear recommendation
tags.description: Summarized findings without committing to a conclusion

tags.label: Weak summary
tags.description: Recommendation present but not well-supported by earlier analysis

tags.label: Bottom-up not top-down
tags.description: Led with reasoning before stating the recommendation

tags.label: Recommendation unsupported by case data
tags.description: Failed to link recommendation back to specific data points from the case

tags.label: Overly long responses
tags.description: Answers ramble beyond what is needed; loses the interviewer

tags.label: Unclear communication
tags.description: Interviewer had to ask for clarification multiple times

tags.label: Excessive filler language
tags.description: Heavy use of 'um', 'so', 'basically', 'kind of'

tags.label: No signposting
tags.description: Did not signal transitions between framework sections

tags.label: Repeated points
tags.description: Said the same thing multiple times without adding value

tags.label: Hesitant delivery
tags.description: Constant hedging and qualifications undermined otherwise good points

tags.label: Backtracked under pressure
tags.description: Abandoned correct reasoning when the interviewer pushed back

tags.label: Over-apologized
tags.description: Excessive apologies for minor missteps disrupted the flow

tags.label: Became defensive
tags.description: Reacted to feedback defensively rather than engaging constructively
